economic_notes: Kyah Development Corporation, Kyah Development Limited Partnership, and Kyah Food and Fuel Inc. are government business enterprises accounted for under modified equity method. Houston Pellet Limited Partnership held as 10% limited partner. Earnings from investment in Nation business enterprises were $8,687,987 in 2024. Distribution of $1,000,000 received from Nation business enterprises.
notes: Audit is qualified on three bases: (1) no budget presented as required by PSAB, (2) financial records not available for Nation business enterprises accounted for under modified equity method (Kyah Development LP, Kyah Development Corp, Kyah Food and Fuel Inc.), and (3) financial records not available for consolidated business enterprises. Total deferred revenue note was truncated in source text; deferred_revenue set to 0 as full schedule was not available. Tangible capital assets net book value not extractable as Schedule 1 data was not provided in the text. Long-term debt balance not explicitly stated; only repayment of $110,973 shown in cash flow. Accumulated remeasurement gains of $190,126 exist separately. GIC portfolio investments of $31,028,742 held. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC + FNHA + CMHC + Province of BC + Other federal agencies = 41,334,172 - 28,166,204 = 13,167,968.
